notes: All Stories created 2026-05-25 after the 2026-05-22 split from 002-data-ingestion.

Phase 17 transitioned to Done; Phase 1 (OCS-83) transitioned to In Progress on 2026-05-25 because a prototype lives in scripts/instagram-fetch-latest/load_posts_tsv.py while the backend implementation is waiting on 002's DB + read/write API.

Subtasks for Phase 1 were created because the story is partially complete — the prototype script implements parts of T028/T029/T030/T032 and the challenge-handler pattern needed for T035. Other Phases (2, 3, 17) are stories-only per the team convention.

T033 (Instagram Graph API fallback) is intentionally NOT created in JIRA — FR-043 was retired by the 2026-05-25 spec amendment. The task remains in tasks.md per Cardinal Rule #1 but is a no-op for implementation.
T035 (CLI manage.py login) creation hit a Cloudflare rate-limit block during the 2026-05-25 batch sync. Create manually in JIRA or retry the sync later — then update this mapping with the issue key.
